name: harness.debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation_target_state_audit_mcw
description: Audit debug map-editor terrain/trap/radiation primitives end-to-end under the proof-freeze rules: paint a distinctive terrain/trap/radiation tuple onto the target tile through the debug map editor, prove the case-sensitive save/writeback gate, then require same-run saved-map metadata for the exact terrain, trap, and radiation value. This is harness primitive/process evidence, not product-feature proof.

steps.label: debug_map_editor_place_dead_grass_east
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug map-editor primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug map editor returns to the live map after selecting t_grass_dead and applying it to the target tile one square east
steps.expected_immediate_state: t_grass_dead should exist on the saved target tile one square east, but this row is credited only through the later same-run saved-map metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing same-run saved-map t_grass_dead metadata after save makes this debug map-editor row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug map-editor terrain primitive unless audit_saved_map_tile_after_debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation is green

steps.label: debug_map_editor_place_bubblewrap_trap_east
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture remains loaded and focused; debug map-editor trap primitive starts from the main map screen after the terrain paint helper exits
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug map editor returns to the live map after selecting tr_bubblewrap and applying it to the target tile one square east
steps.expected_immediate_state: tr_bubblewrap should exist on the saved target tile one square east along with t_grass_dead, but this row is credited only through the later same-run saved-map metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing same-run saved-map tr_bubblewrap metadata after save makes this debug map-editor row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug map-editor trap primitive unless audit_saved_map_tile_after_debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation is green

steps.label: debug_map_editor_place_radiation_37_east
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture remains loaded and focused; debug map-editor radiation primitive starts from the main map screen after the trap paint helper exits
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug map editor returns to the live map after selecting radiation value 37 and applying it to the target tile one square east
steps.expected_immediate_state: radiation value 37 should exist on the saved target tile one square east along with t_grass_dead and tr_bubblewrap, but this row is credited only through the later same-run saved-map metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing same-run saved-map radiation metadata after save makes this debug map-editor row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug map-editor radiation primitive unless audit_saved_map_tile_after_debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation is green

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after debug map-editor terrain/trap/radiation placement and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the debug map-editor terrain/trap/radiation save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the debug map-editor terrain/trap/radiation steps; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.next_step_gate: saved-map terrain/trap/radiation metadata may be credited only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the debug map-editor terrain/trap/radiation save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed debug map-editor terrain/trap/radiation save, proving the following saved-map audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_map_tile_after_debug_map_editor_terrain_trap_radiation
steps.abort_reason: saved-map metadata did not contain t_grass_dead, tr_bubblewrap, and radiation 37 at player-relative offset [1,0,0] after same-run debug map-editor save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved-map metadata contains t_grass_dead, tr_bubblewrap, and radiation 37 one tile east of the player after the debug map-editor primitive
